name: Potato Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the salt pork in a heavy saucepot over low heat until the fat renders.
2. Add onion and celery, cooking until softened without browning.
3. Stir in flour to form a roux; cook 4-5 minutes without coloring.
4. Slowly whisk in chicken stock, heating until it comes to a boil.
5. Add potatoes and simmer until tender.
6. Mix in creamed corn, then hot milk and heavy cream.
7. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with minced parsley before serving.
